texto: Will we ever see his like again? It is doubtful. But at least for a brief moment in time we were lucky to have him as one of our own: an English lionheart who was the terror of the continent, who earned the love and respect of everyone who had the privilege to see him in action and above all was a thoroughly decent hero of whom we can be proud. Rest in peace 'Big Dunc'. Your feats will echo in eternity.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a James Leighton: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Will we ever see his like again? It is doubtful. But at least for a brief moment in time we were …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, biography, busby-babes pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de busby-babes e duncan-edwards.
